fields.description: The workbook (BOQs) this remark belongs to. Denormalized (mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing) so the layer is filterable by BoQ.
fields.label: BoQ

fields.description: The committed sheet name, stored VERBATIM (#152 -- never stripped/trimmed). Part of the durable Excel-address identity (survives a re-commit).
fields.label: Sheet Name

fields.description: The source Excel row number this remark annotates (= BOQ Nodes.source_row_number = the committed grid row_number). Durable identity component. A remark is PER-ROW (no col_letter).
fields.label: Excel Row

fields.description: The committed-tier commit_version of the sheet this remark annotates. Annotation is anchored to a committed version; identity component.
fields.label: Committed Version

fields.description: A copy of the committed row's description at remark time -- a copy-forward MATCH GUARD (a future copy-forward slice warns when the committed description changed under a remark). NOT part of the unique key; never branched on.
fields.label: Description (guard)

fields.description: The free-text note the user authored for this committed row (capped at 250 chars by the write path, mirroring the review-screen remark).
fields.label: Remark

fields.description: Per-(boq, sheet_name, excel_row, committed_version) remark version. Incremented on re-save by the write path (freeze-and-supersede, mirroring the pricing tier).
fields.label: Remark Version

fields.description: Exactly one current remark record per (boq, sheet_name, excel_row, committed_version). The one-current invariant is enforced by the write path (pricing.py save_row_remark), NOT in this controller (mirrors the pricing-tier convention).
fields.label: Is Current

fields.description: When this remark record was written. Set by the write path.
fields.label: Remarked At
